titleStmt.title: SII 7.1046: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1046. (A.R. No. 413 of 1902). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE SIVA TEMPLE AT KULAMBANDAL CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiṅkaḷertaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭai kiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarn tu ceṅko locci karuṅkali kaṭin tu tantaiyar tamaiyaṉ tampiyar tan=ti rumaintareṉṟivarai maṇimuṭi cūṭṭik kaṉni kāvalar teṉṉavar muvarunRead muvaruḷ.vāṉaka miruvark karuḷik kāṉakam Oruvaṉuk kaḷittup porucilaic ceralaṉ velaikeḻu kān=ta ḷurccālai kalamaṟuppittu Ilaṅkaiyaṟ karaicaiyum Alaṅkal vallapaṉaiyuṅ kaṉnakucciyar kāvalaṉaiyum
ponṉaṇi muṭittalai taṭin tu taṉ koṭippaṭai Evik kaṉnāṭakar viṭu karipuraḷat tanṉāṭaiyiṟ tamiṭparaṇi koṇ ṭoṉṉār vañciraRead vaccira.neṭuvāḷ viccayaṉ veruvi neḷit tañciyoṭat taṉ vañciyampaṭaiyāl Āṅkavaṉ pitāvai mātāvoṭu catāmaliviṅku taṉ viram pūṇṭura veñcamat taṭalervāraṇavaraicaik kaṭalpuraic ciṟutuṟai perun tuṟait teyvavimarasi yeṉ ṟuṟutuṟai muṉṟilum Oḷirpuṉa lūṭṭivit tāṅkavar rettak kiriyil Ōṅkiya luḻuvaiye
ṟeḻuti Uyarjayasta mpam Eḻilpeṟa niṟuttit taṉkaḻal paṇintoḻukum Araicarkaḷoṭu ceṇṭāṭip porupuli virakkoṭi yeṭut toṉṉalar kavarnta tuṉnetip piṟakkam Iravalarāṉork kiyn tu viravalla maṟṟavar varaviṭu moṟṟaraip piṭippit tāṅkavar mārvil Ākavamallaṉ yāṅṅaṉam Añcinaneṉna naṉkeḻutic celuttiya(p)piṉṉait taṉ pulippaṭai Evi Avaṉ viṭu taṇṭuttukkavaṉ vilpuravi
nuḷampaṉuṅ kāḷitāsaṉum viḷamperun=tā rc cāmuṇṭaṉum poṟkommayaṉum villavarā[jaṉu mu]talinar velcamat tiriya Āṅkavar peruneti kavarn tu kūṟṟaraṉuppaḷaṉ kommalarp pacun=ta lai tarāttayilp paṉtaṭin tu munkoṇṭu takaivanta paḻai muṉṟai Appakai cekut tuppaḷaṉvaḻiyiṟ ṟappiya varaicar Āṅkatu mikkamāṭṭātu taṉ pūṅkaḻal caraṇeṉap pukun=ta varaṇavirkkaḷitta
taṭimuṭik kiṭaṅkuṭut tirun=ta taṭaṅkavaṉa tappaiyaip paṟittuṭaṉkoṇṭu potuṟai puṉa liraṭṭapāṭi yerimaṭut tavviraṭṭa meḻaṟaiyilakkamum matimuṉ ṉāṇṭu viśvalo kattu viḷaṅku maṉuneṟi niṉṟaśva metañ cey taraicu vīṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉuyarn=ta perumpukaḻ kovirājakesaripanma rāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājā- dhi rājade vaṟku yāṇṭu muppa
ttumuṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kāliyūṟkoṭṭattup pākūrṉāṭṭu nakaram vikkiramacoḻapurattuk kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaīśvara muṭaiyāṟku Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhi rājade var gurude var Atikārikaḷ pārācaryan vāsudevanā rāyaṇaṉāna Ulakaḷan=ta coḻa brahmā rāyaṉ vaitta tirunun=tā viḷakku Oṉṟukkuc cāvā muvāp pe
rāṭu toṇṇūṟu man=ti kkāppukkup poṉ Aiṅkaḻañcum Ittevar tiruvuṇāḻikaiuṭaiya civabrāhma ṇan kauśi kaṉ mallapaṭṭaṉum kauśi kaṉ cūriyatevaṉum kauśi kaṉ paṭṭālakaṉum bhāratvāśi can=ti racekaraṉum Iṉṉālvom Ivvāṭum Ippoḷaṉum kaikkoṇṭu Ivvāṭu toṇṇū
Arumoḻitevaṉāl nicata muḻakku neyyum Ippoṉṉukku van=ta palicaiyāl tiruvan=ti kkāppukku nicatam Iruceviṭarai yeṇṇaiyu maṭṭi Ittiruviḷakkum Ittiruvan=ti kkāppum candrādi ttavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomāṉom Ikkoyilil kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhma ṇarom Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻuti
śivabrāha ṇaṉ kaucikaṉ kaṇavatipaṭṭaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 7.1046 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
